entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange officially established in 2017 and currently offering spot, futures, earn, copy-trading, OTC, card, and Web3-related services under the CoinW brand.
entity.notes: Official first-party materials verify the 2017 establishment year and current global operation but do not clearly identify a single operating-company domicile. The existing United Arab Emirates origin marker is retained pending stronger legal-entity evidence rather than replaced by inference.

expected.summary: United Arab Emirates-based centralized exchange launched in 2017 and still operating under the CoinW brand.

changes.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange officially established in 2017 and currently offering spot, futures, earn, copy-trading, OTC, card, and Web3-related services under the CoinW brand.
changes.notes: Official first-party materials verify the 2017 establishment year and current global operation but do not clearly identify a single operating-company domicile. The existing United Arab Emirates origin marker is retained pending stronger legal-entity evidence rather than replaced by inference.

events.title: CoinW was officially established in 2017
events.description: CoinW's official corporate timeline records that the exchange was officially established in 2017.
events.notes: The official sources establish the year but not an exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: CoinW launched its 2.0 matching engine in 2019
events.description: CoinW's official timeline records the launch of its 2.0 matching engine, described as providing microsecond-level trade execution.
events.notes: The official timeline establishes the year but not an exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: CoinW About Us and corporate timeline
evidence.notes: The official timeline records that CoinW was officially established in 2017.

evidence.title: CoinW Security and Protection
evidence.notes: The official security page states that CoinW has operated since its founding in 2017.

evidence.title: CoinW About Us and corporate timeline
evidence.notes: The official timeline records the 2019 launch of the CoinW 2.0 matching engine.

evidence.title: CoinW official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current spot, futures, copy-trading, earn, OTC, card, and related services.
